accurate.why: All claims match the bill text and verifiable context: NPS rule, 90 FR 2621, CRA (chapter 8 of title 5), and May 23, 2025 approval.

no_hallucinations.why: The Congressional Review Act reference is accurate context for chapter 8 of title 5, and no claims are fabricated or contradict the bill.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the resolution nullifies the NPS motor vehicle rule for Glen Canyon National Recreation Area.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly explains the rule is disapproved and shall have no force or effect under the CRA.

exceptions_conditions.why: A simple CRA disapproval resolution contains no material exceptions or carve-outs.

effective_dates.why: Correctly notes the resolution took effect upon approval on May 23, 2025.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the sole operative effect: congressional disapproval nullifying the identified rule.

objective_tone.why: Summary is neutral with no advocacy or editorializing.

concise.why: Brief and free of padding or repetition.

correct_entities.why: Correctly identifies the National Park Service, Glen Canyon NRA, and the Congressional Review Act.

correct_figures.why: Federal Register citation (90 FR 2621) and date (May 23, 2025) are both correct.
